title: clematis × hybrida
intro: Clematis × hybrida, also known as the garden clematis or large-flowered clematis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clematis × hybrida include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural pain reliever. The herbal preparations of Clematis × hybrida can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
